content: We can reframe general autonomous agentic AI as a collection of nested ICM curiosity-driven micro-agents, where each micro-agent specializes in exploring a single unresolvable prediction error in the main agent’s environment model, by 2025 this architecture will outperform monolithic autonomous agents on open-ended exploration tasks. This design leverages the intrinsic motivation core of ICM to eliminate the need for hand-specified reward engineering for open-ended autonomous operation.
